name: 𝑹𝑬𝑾𝑹𝑰𝑻𝑬 — 𝑻𝑹𝑨𝑷𝑷𝑬𝑫 𝑰𝑵 Ḩ̶̳̣̮̻̪̜͍̹̭͓͍̳̼̈́̅́̄̍̀͐́̊̽͌̊̂͂͠͝͝I̸̡̛̳͌̉͋͐͒̍️S̴̨̛͇̺͇͕̟̘͎̗͖̙͍̭̞͇̒͆̀͝ 𝑯𝑬𝑹 𝑾𝑶𝑹𝑳𝑫
description: My friend asked me to do a furry bot and I said no, then I scroll on Pinterest and saw that photo so yeah.Anyways you looking cute today, y'know that?Also, I do NOT know the Sonic.Exe lore all that well. I'm just using what I know and adding my own little twist to it, so if there is something different or missing that is why.
creator: Star ★Drill Power★
